title: Add test coverage for orchestrator/traces_db.py helper functions
description: traces_db.py has 14 tables and critical helper functions (get_agent_history, get_agent_scorecard, log_agent_metrics, create_alert) with no dedicated tests. The harness scout depends on these queries returning correct data.
requirements: Test schema initialization creates all tables
done_criteria: tests/test_traces_db.py exists with at least 6 test functions
context: traces_db.py is the observability backbone. 14 tables, 0 dedicated tests.
